Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like a storage shed. There's[n]nothing particularly interesting about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2032 0 0}You can't go back downstairs through there. I know, it's confusing, right?[n]{f 1 1}
